metadata.title: A Minimal IEEE Paper
metadata.abstract: This paper demonstrates the smallest valid document that the Auto-IEEE Layout Compiler can typeset: a title, one author, an abstract, keywords, and two body sections. It is a good starting point for understanding the JSON document model before adding figures, tables, or equations.

blocks.text: This section introduces the purpose of the paper. Body paragraphs are justified and automatically flow across the two-column layout.
A second paragraph shows that consecutive paragraphs are rendered with a first-line indent, matching standard IEEE conference formatting.
This minimal example compiles to a complete, submission-formatted single-column-per-section document with no figures, tables, or equations.
